title: Morning at the Bakery
synopsis: A quick visit to the bakery fills a street with warm smells and happy choices.
sentences: Every Saturday, Hana walked with her mother to the bakery at the end of the street.
The warm smell of fresh bread reached them before they opened the door.
Inside, trays of rolls, buns, and cakes stood behind the glass.
The baker wore a white apron and greeted them with a cheerful smile.
Hana stood on her toes to see everything.
She chose a small iced bun while her mother bought a loaf and two rolls.
The paper bag felt warm in Hana's hands when the baker passed it to her.
Outside, the street looked ordinary, but the bag made the walk home feel exciting.
Hana tore a tiny piece from her bun before they reached the gate.
It tasted soft and sweet, just as she had hoped.
Her mother laughed and told her to save some for later.
